hero.title: Discover Your Dream Vacation
hero.subtitle: Experience unforgettable travel journeys with Flag Global

about.shortDesc: At Flag Global, we offer unique experiences to travel enthusiasts. With years of expertise, we create personalized and unforgettable vacation plans for each of our clients.
about.story: Flag Global was founded in 2015 with an innovative vision for the tourism industry. Since our establishment, we have served thousands of happy customers and introduced Turkey's most beautiful destinations to the world. With our experienced team and extensive partner network, we offer travel solutions suitable for every budget and taste.
about.mission: Our mission is to make a difference in the tourism industry by providing personalized, reliable, and unforgettable travel experiences to each of our clients.
about.vision: Our vision is to serve at world-class standards with a sustainable tourism approach, as one of Turkey's leading tourism companies.

destinations.subtitle: Discover the most beautiful places in Turkey

items.name: Antalya
items.description: The pearl of the Mediterranean with its turquoise waters, golden beaches, and historical richness. Antalya is a unique holiday paradise where nature and history meet in perfect harmony.

items.name: Bodrum
items.description: Enchanting Bodrum with its blue-flag beaches, historic castle, and vibrant nightlife. An unforgettable vacation experience with luxury marinas and authentic stone houses.

items.name: Cappadocia
items.description: A fairytale world with fairy chimneys, underground cities, and hot air balloons. Cappadocia is a unique place created by nature and history together.

items.name: Istanbul
items.description: The megacity bridging two continents, blending thousands of years of history with modern life. A unique experience from Hagia Sophia to the Grand Bazaar, from the Bosphorus to the Islands.

footer.description: Flag Global is a leading travel company offering reliable and professional tourism services.

items.name: Ayşe Yılmaz
items.text: Our Cappadocia tour with Flag Global was magnificent. Everything was perfectly planned, and our guide was very knowledgeable. We will definitely choose them again!

items.name: Mehmet Kaya
items.text: We chose Flag Global for our Bodrum vacation and were very satisfied. Hotel selection, transfers, and every detail was thoughtfully arranged.

items.name: Fatma Demir
items.text: Our Antalya package tour was wonderful. The price-performance ratio was excellent. Our children had a great time too. Thank you Flag Global!

items.name: Ali Özkan
items.text: The Istanbul tour exceeded our expectations. Professional guidance and flawless organization. I recommend it to everyone.

team.subtitle: Meet our experienced and passionate team

items.question: How can I make a tour reservation?
items.answer: You can make a reservation by contacting us through our website or via our WhatsApp line (+90 544 470 62 00). Our expert team will offer you the most suitable tour options.

items.question: What is your cancellation and refund policy?
items.answer: Full refund is provided for cancellations made up to 7 days before the tour start date. For detailed information, please contact our customer service.

items.question: Do you offer transfer services?
items.answer: Yes, VIP airport-hotel transfer service is included in all our tour packages. You can also request private city transfer service.

items.question: Are there special discounts for children?
items.answer: Children aged 0-6 are free, and children aged 7-12 can join our tours with a 50% discount.

items.question: Do you organize private group tours?
items.answer: Yes, we prepare customized tour programs for corporate events, wedding groups, and special organizations. Contact us for details.
